content: Chicago Fire FC and Robert Lewandowski are finalizing the details of a deal that would see the Poland striker move to MLS this summer, a source confirmed to ESPN.

zh.title: 消息人士：火队与莱万达夫斯基交易进入最后阶段
zh.summary: 芝加哥火队和罗伯特·莱万达夫斯基正在完成一笔转会交易的最后阶段，这笔交易将在今年夏天把这位波兰前锋带到美国职业足球大联盟。这次转会对联盟来说是一次重大收购，也标志着这位资深前锋职业生涯的重大转变。

title: Marsch's 'Canadian heroes' deliver defining win
summary: Canada defeated South Africa in the World Cup knockout stage to advance to the round of 16, marking the co-host nation's first-ever knockout victory in the tournament. Coach Jesse Marsch celebrated the historic achievement, describing his players as "Canadian heroes."
content: After Canada beat South Africa to win their first-ever FIFA World Cup knockout match and advance to the round of 16, coach Jesse Marsch didn't hesitate to call his players "Canadian heroes."

zh.title: 马什的"加拿大英雄"取得决定性胜利
zh.summary: 加拿大在世界杯淘汰赛阶段击败南非，晋级16强，这标志着作为共同东道主的加拿大在本届锦标赛中首次取得淘汰赛胜利。教练杰西·马什庆祝了这一历史性的成就，称他的球员为"加拿大英雄"。

title: South Korea coach quits after WC exit, criticism
summary: South Korea coach Hong Myung-Bo resigned following the team's early World Cup elimination and subsequent criticism from the country's president. The resignation reflects mounting pressure surrounding the team's tournament performance.
content: South Korea coach Hong Myung-Bo resigned Sunday, a day after the team's quick elimination from the World Cup and following heavy criticism from the country's president.

zh.title: 韩国主教练在世界杯出局和批评后辞职
zh.summary: 韩国主教练洪明甫在球队在世界杯中提前出局以及随后遭到国家总统批评后宣布辞职。这次辞职反映了围绕球队赛事表现的不断增加的压力。

title: Ancelotti refuses to engage in Japan 'mind games'
summary: Brazil manager Carlo Ancelotti declined to participate in pre-match psychological tactics ahead of the round of 32 clash with Japan on Monday. His approach signals Brazil's focus on match preparation rather than external gamesmanship.
content: Brazil manager Carlo Ancelotti refused to engage in 'mind games' ahead of the round of 32 clash with Japan on Monday.

zh.title: 安切洛蒂拒绝参与日本"心理战"
zh.summary: 巴西主教练卡洛·安切洛蒂拒绝在周一与日本进行的32强对阵前参与赛前心理战术。他的态度表明巴西专注于比赛准备，而不是心理层面的较量。

title: Kubo out vs Brazil but Japan can 'change history'
summary: Japan will be without key playmaker Takefusa Kubo for a third consecutive match in Monday's round-of-32 encounter with Brazil. Despite the absence, the Japanese team believes they can upset the heavily favored Brazilians.
content: For the third consecutive game Japan will be without key playmaker Takefusa Kubo for Monday's massive round-of-32 meeting with Brazil.

zh.title: 久保缺席对阵巴西，但日本可以"改写历史"
zh.summary: 日本将在周一与巴西的32强比赛中连续第三场缺少关键中场久保建英。尽管缺少这位球员，日本队相信他们能爆冷战胜被看好的巴西队。

title: Germany boss: Paraguay an 'uncomfortable' game
summary: Germany manager Julian Nagelsmann described Paraguay as an "uncomfortable" opponent in the round of 32, emphasizing that his team will need a flawless performance to advance. The comment reflects respect for Paraguay's defensive capabilities and tactical challenges.
content: Julian Nagelsmann said Paraguay are an "uncomfortable" opponent for Germany in the round of 32 and believes his team will need a "perfect" performance to get through.

zh.title: 德国主帅：巴拉圭是"令人不适的"对手
zh.summary: 德国主教练朱利安·那格尔斯曼在32强中将巴拉圭描述为"令人不适的"对手，强调他的球队需要完美的表现才能晋级。这个评论反映了对巴拉圭防守能力和战术挑战的尊重。

title: Sportsbooks sweat U.S. run entering knockouts
summary: As the World Cup enters the knockout stage, sportsbooks are closely monitoring the United States' surprising run after strong group stage performance. France and Argentina remain tournament favorites, but America's success is creating betting market volatility.
content: Star-powered France and Argentina top the odds board to win the World Cup as the tournament moves into the knockout stage, while the United States' positive momentum will have sportsbooks sweating more with each game they win.

zh.title: 体育博彩公司担忧美国队晋级淘汰赛
zh.summary: 随着世界杯进入淘汰赛阶段，体育博彩公司密切关注美国队在小组赛表现强劲后令人惊艳的表现。法国和阿根廷仍是赛事热门，但美国队的成功正在造成投注市场波动。

title: Uruguay, Utd's Ugarte suffers knee ligament injury...
summary: Uruguay midfielder Manuel Ugarte suffered a knee ligament injury during the team's final group stage match against Spain, confirmed by Manchester United. The injury raises concerns about his availability for both remaining tournament matches and club competition.
content: Uruguay midfielder Manuel Ugarte has suffered a knee ligament injury in his final World Cup group stage match against Spain, Manchester United have confirmed.

zh.title: 乌拉圭与曼联选手乌加尔特遭膝盖韧带伤
zh.summary: 乌拉圭中场球员曼努埃尔·乌加尔特在球队与西班牙的最后一场小组赛中遭受膝盖韧带伤，曼联确认了此伤。该伤势引发了人们对他在剩余比赛和俱乐部比赛中能否参赛的担忧。

title: Inside how a U.S. academy helped mold World Cup ph...
summary: Teenager Yan Diomande, who developed at a Florida academy before becoming a target for Europe's elite clubs, exemplifies how American youth programs are producing World Cup-caliber talent. His rise illustrates changing dynamics in global player development and youth recruitment.
content: Teenager Yan Diomande is a top target for Europe's biggest clubs this summer. Before he was a star, though, he was a promising winger in Florida called "Dio."

zh.title: 揭秘美国学院如何培养世界杯天才
zh.summary: 少年球员颜·迪奥曼德在佛罗里达学院成长后成为欧洲顶级俱乐部争取的目标，他是美国青年项目如何培养世界杯级别人才的典范。他的崛起反映了全球球员发展和青年招聘格局的变化。

title: Gab Marcotti's Best XI of World Cup group stage: M...
summary: Pundit Gab Marcotti selected an all-star lineup from the World Cup group stage, balancing elite performers with standout underdog contributors. The selection showcases both established superstars and emerging talents who impressed during the initial tournament phase.
content: The 2026 World Cup group stage has given us tons to cheer about, from superstars on form to wonderful underdog stories. How do you turn that into a best XI? Gab Marcotti gives it a shot.

zh.title: 加布·马科蒂的世界杯小组赛最佳十一人阵容
zh.summary: 评论员加布·马科蒂从世界杯小组赛中精选了一支全明星阵容，平衡了顶级球员和表现突出的黑马贡献者。这个选择展示了在初期赛阶段留下深刻印象的既有超级巨星和新兴人才。

title: 'You are Canadian heroes' - the forgotten hosts making World Cup history
summary: Co-host Canada is achieving historic success at the World Cup with a breakthrough run that is transforming the country's football landscape. The team's progress signals a potential shift in Canada's football culture and global relevance in the sport.
content: Canada are making history at this World Cup with a run that is likely to change the face of football in the country forever.

zh.title: "你们是加拿大英雄" - 正在创造世界杯历史的被遗忘的东道主
zh.summary: 共同东道主加拿大在世界杯上取得了历史性的成功，突破性的表现正在改变该国的足球格局。该队的进展预示着加拿大足球文化和在该运动中全球地位的潜在转变。
